Candida =E2=80=93 the insidious yeast fungus

=E2=80=8A

How does Candida affect the body and what can you do to restore balance?

Did you know that a Candida imbalance can be a hidden cause behind everythi=
ng from digestive issues to fatigue and sugar cravings?=C2=A0
=C2=A0
What is Candida?
Candida is a yeast that naturally occurs in the gut, mouth, and on the skin=
, where it is harmless when in balance. However, when it is allowed to over=
grow=E2=80=94such as during stress, high sugar intake, or after antibiotic =
use=E2=80=94it can disrupt the body=E2=80=99s natural microbiome and lead t=
o a range of issues, including:

=E2=80=A2 Bloating and gas
=E2=80=A2 Sugar cravings
=E2=80=A2 Fatigue and brain fog
=E2=80=A2 Skin problems
=E2=80=A2 Recurring yeast infections

=E2=80=8A

[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/blog/candida--the-insidious-yeast-fung=
us)

=E2=80=8A

=E2=80=8A

What can cause overgrowth?
Candida thrives in an environment dominated by sugar and refined carbohydra=
tes. Other contributing factors include:
=E2=80=A2 Antibiotic use
=E2=80=A2 Stress
=E2=80=A2 Weakened immune system
=E2=80=A2 Poor or imbalanced diet

How can you support your body?
Restoring balance involves both reducing overgrowth and strengthening the b=
ody=E2=80=99s natural defenses. You can start by:
=E2=80=A2 Reducing sugar and refined carbohydrates
=E2=80=A2 Eating more fiber-rich and nutrient-dense foods
=E2=80=A2 Supporting the gut microbiome with [probiotics](https://www.great=
life.eu/flora-plus-probiotic)
=E2=80=A2 Using [digestive enzymes](https://www.greatlife.eu/digestive-enzy=
mes-plus) for improved digestion

[Read more about Candida =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.eu/blog/candida--=
the-insidious-yeast-fungus)

Two targeted supports for Candida
For those who want to take a more active approach to managing Candida, spec=
ific supplements can be a valuable addition:

[Candida Control Plus+](https://www.greatlife.eu/candida-control-plus-great=
life) =E2=80=93 a plant-based complex with multiple active extracts that he=
lp counteract Candida overgrowth and support gut balance.

[Undecylenic Acid](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife) =E2=
=80=93 a fatty acid traditionally used to inhibit yeast growth and support =
a healthy microbial environment in the gut.

[Buy Candida Control Plus+ =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.eu/candida-cont=
rol-plus-greatlife)

cylenic-acid-greatlife)

Our advice and tips are not intended for diagnosing or treating diseases. T=

general information and should not be used as a substitute for professional=

 used as a substitute for a varied diet. It is essential to maintain a dive=
